title: Calamity Biomes
description: A biome add-on for MC Calamity
body:
Biomes aren't able to be removed from your world so we've separated the biomes from the [Calamity MC](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mc-calamity) pack so that you're not forced to deal with that

### Biomes Added:
- Sunken Sea
- Underground Desert
